## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize Vercel kickoff prep and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Kickoff Prep:** Kickoff questions are ready, covering goals, competitors, and current content workflows (e.g., AROPS, freelancer John Henry).](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** The core strategy is to dominate search for new AI models (e.g., "Claude Opus 4.6 pricing") by creating high-quality, structured pages.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Urgent Risk:** The project is at risk of churn due to the need for immediate execution. A forward-deploy engineer (Tammy) must start work now, not in 3 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Content Plan:** The strategy requires building a structured content hub with dedicated pages for pricing, comparisons, and FAQs, moving beyond generic overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

## Topics

### Kickoff Prep & Questions

  - [George created kickoff questions to align on Vercel's goals, covering:](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [AI Gateway project](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [Indexing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [AEO & AI visibility priorities](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Key Questions for Vercel:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Validate the pre-researched list (e.g., Render) and identify their top-of-mind concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Current Content Workflow:** Understand their use of AROPS and other tools.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
          - [**Goal:** Uncover pain points to position our service as a direct replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
          - [**Question:** "What is AROPS doing for you, and where can it be improved?"](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** Clarify the relationship with freelancer John Henry.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Strategic Focus & Urgency

  - [**Primary Risk → Churn:** The project requires immediate execution. A 3-week delay for a forward-deploy engineer (Tammy) would likely cause churn.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Strategic Mandate:** We are the strategists, not just executors. We must proactively define the path to success.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Core Strategy → Dominate Search for New AI Models:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - **Goal:** Rank \#1 for high-intent searches (e.g., "Claude Opus 4.6 pricing").
      - [**Rationale:** Vercel's current pages are weak and underperform.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
          - [**Example:** A changelog ranks above the official AI Gateway page for "AI gateway Opus 4.6."](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
          - [**Problem:** Pricing is buried in a table, not a clear feature.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Content Strategy & Structure

  - [**Solution → Build a Structured Content Hub:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [**Model Provider Cards:** Create detailed, cross-linked pages for each model, similar to CheckDat's format.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Dedicated Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
          - [`/pricing`: A clear, dedicated page for pricing details.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
          - [`/comparisons`: Head-to-head articles (e.g., `ai-gateway/comparisons/vercel-vs-render`).](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
          - [`/answers` or `/faq`: A hub for common questions.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Pre-Call Research:** George has already loaded the CheckDat workspace with:](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [AI Gateway docs](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Guillermo's voice/tone analysis](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [Initial product overview](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Review kickoff questions and add details on Vercel's current content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [Schedule a 30-min "gameplay" session with Marcel post-kickoff to accelerate execution.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [Clarify Tammy's immediate availability to start work.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Prune non-applicable prompts from the CheckDat workspace after the kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/TYTDfyqJvXzagg2M2LVX9DnN__4kWPjm?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
